response.overview: Spring is here, and it's time to celebrate Passover at Bubbe's. From the creators of the award-winning "Chanuka at Bubbe's" comes this second in the series on Jewish holidays. The outstanding all puppet cast again features Bubbe herself...everybody's favorite grandmother. While these delightful characters help Bubbe prepare for her annual Seder, they are surprised by a talking Haggadah and are magically whisked back to Egypt during the time of the Pharaohs. There, they experience the trials of captivity and ultimately, a triumphant escape to freedom.  Original songs as well as traditional favorites provide a joyous Passover experience for the entire family.
response.title: Passover at Bubbe's
